Blend garlic, onions, herbs, honey, and lemon juice in a vitamix blender on high until smooth
Add cucumber and jalapeno in small chunks while blending, gradually
Gradually add in oil to emulsify.  Season with salt to taste.
***NOTE: Spice and Saltiness will change based on seasons for jalapeno and cucumbers
Reserve in quart containers in the cooler
